feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Debt and Investment Management
entry.content:
Hi,

our customer is working as an investment holding that issues and receives loans for/from several intercompany partner. Apart from that they investment money at different places. For example they buy shares of different companies worldwide.

My question is how we can track/manage these investments and how we can valuate these investments with certain percentage rate or market values. Has anyone experience in that kind of topic?

Thank you so much!

Best,

Marcel

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: the Right Cloud ERP Solution for Your Business
entry.content:
An introduction: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Over half a century ago, two of SAP's co-founders pioneered a system designed to process business transaction entries in real time. This marked the inception of a visionary journey aimed at creating a standardized program capable of seamlessly integrating business processes by processing enterprise data in real time. This visionary concept laid the foundation for the remarkable success story of SAP Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) Software, a legacy that endures to this day. [SAP's history - fifty years and counting] 

An Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system integrates all the essential business functions into a single, unified platform, connecting business operations seamlessly together. ERP Software has gone an evolutionary path and in recent years Cloud ERP has gained significant traction. As opposed to traditional on-premises ERP systems installed and maintained on local servers, a Cloud ERP system is hosted on remote servers and can be accessed anytime, anywhere, from any internet-enabled device.  

In the fast-paced world of ERP systems, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition has emerged as a leading solution [read the analyst’s reports] for businesses seeking to streamline operations, to drive innovation, and to stay ahead of the competition. In this 5-minute read, I ‘d like to walk you through the key features, including the SaaS qualities of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, for businesses considering adoption. 

Highlights of Key Features and Capabilities: 

1. Unified Business Insights. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition provides a cohesive view of your business by seamlessly integrating essential functional modules. Leveraging SAP's deep industry knowledge, the solution incorporates pre-configured business process best practices. With over 50 local country/region versions and support for 30+ languages, it adapts effortlessly to diverse regulatory frameworks, including local tax laws and GAAP financial standards. This global-ready solution empowers your business to thrive on the international stage. 
Explore a comprehensive array of modules covering finance, procurement, customer order management, after-sales service, manufacturing, and supply chain management. By integrating finance and operations seamlessly on a unified platform, You can prioritize essential modules to start with, for example, finance and accounting, to gain consolidated cross-organizational financial insights and as business needs evolve, additional modules can be seamlessly added without the hassle of implementing a second Cloud ERP instance, ensuring scalability and flexibility for long-term growth.          

(Chart 1. Full-featured SaaS Cloud ERP)

2. Adaptability and extensibility. You have access to a comprehensive toolset to adapt the Cloud ERP solution to match your unique business needs, fostering innovation and better alignment with evolving business requirements.    

Customization capability. Utilizing a guided customization procedure, you can tailor pre-defined best practices processes to accommodate your specific process variations and workflows. This ensures that your ERP system functions optimally and aligns perfectly with your organizational processes and structures. 

 

  (Chart 2 – Customization Example: Approve Bank Payment) 

 Extensibility and Integration. 

        There are multiple choices for you to extend SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for your different use
        cases.           

 (Chart 3. Extensibility Options Use Cases)

      To explore the technical details of each extensibility, please follow the online documents:

Key User Extensibility in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Developer Extensibility in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ABAP Environment 

Side-by-Side Extensibility in SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) 

Furthermore, SAP provides a comprehensive range of technical components, including APIs, Business Events, and BAPIs/IDocs, facilitating the smooth integration of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition into your current infrastructure. Please check out details on SAP Business Accelerator Hub    

3. Continuous Innovation. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition prioritizes continuous innovation by embracing agile development methodologies and actively listening to feedback from customers. This iterative approach allows for rapid delivery of new features and enhancements at a pace of two major releases a year accompanied by monthly innovation updates.  

The agility of SaaS delivery makes it possible that SAP can quickly incorporate advanced technologies, such as predictive analytics, machine learning and artificial intelligence, allowing companies to benefit from modern technologies with least effort.  

Notably, SAP has recently launched the Early Adopter Care program for the Digital Assistant Joule, specifically tailored to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition users. See Joule in Action and experience the future of intelligent ERP solutions.  

 (Chart 4. Joule and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition)

4. Modern User Experience. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is designed with clean layouts, intuitive navigation, and consistent design patterns. Business users can easily find all the information needed to accomplish their daily tasks, such as, “To Dos”, “Favorite Apps” or “Insights” with analytics dashboards. With two or three clicks business users can rapidly personalize the working pages. With embedded collaboration tool, such as SAP Collaboration Manager or using native integration with MS Teams, it is easy and fast for business users to exchange information across the department.  

 (Chart 5. Home Page for Sales Clerk) 

5. Built-in security and compliance.  By choosing SAP to manage the security of your cloud ERP network, operating system, database, and application, you gain the advantage of a unified and cohesive security approach. Data Encryption, Identity and Access Management, Audit Trials and Logging, Data residency and privacy controls are examples in how SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition safeguards your critical business data by fulfilling the highest industry standards. With SAP regularly security updates, your system is protected best so that you can focus on pursuing your business objectives.  

6. Subscription licensing model. The subscription to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition operates on an annual license fee basis, encompassing cloud infrastructure, core business modules, optional add-ons, and user licenses. With this flexible model, you pay only for the resources and features your business requires. Scaling up is seamless, allowing for the activation of additional functional modules and user licenses to accommodate business growth effortlessly. 

Companies Business Benefits 

Companies who have adopted SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition are reporting the significant business benefits about efficiency improvements, business  transparency, and the fast speed of innovation adoption.  

“After just a few months, we can see that our processes became faster and more efficient. We now have a much better grip on production, stock, and delivery times, allowing us to serve our customers even better.” [read the full story] 

“Working with SAP, we’re building a cloud-based business platform that’s fit for the future in a dynamic market, facilitates business process standardization and integration across Asia Pacific and the world, and achieves supply chain excellence along the industry value chain.” [read the full story] 

Please find more SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition success stories here 

Summary 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is SAP’s SaaS Cloud ERP offering, that leverages the power of SAP's flagship S/4HANA platform to deliver real-time insights, intelligent automation, and streamlined processes. Built on a multi-tenant architecture, the Public Edition offers scalability, agility, and rapid innovation, enabling businesses to adapt to changing market dynamics and drive digital transformation. 

Find out more about SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition on www.sap.com/s4hana and request a demo to start your exploration with SAP or SAP’s partner today.  

 

Recommended read: Busting the Biggest ERP Myth - That it's Not Suitable for SMBs

entry.title: Update Supplier Master Data through migration cockpit
entry.content:
I just uploaded supplier master data through migration cockpit, but I forgot to fill in the purchasing organization data sheet. I tried to re upload with only fill in the Purchasing Organization Data sheet and General Data sheet (the mandatory column only). but i can not upload transfer the data to staging tables, the error message is Cannot insert 1100000090 into table /1LT/DSZOS000097 (S_SUPPL_GEN); instance already exists in the table. But if I am not fill in the data in General Data sheet, I still can't upload the data , the error message is 

Sheet General Data, field BP Grouping, row 9 is empty; enter value for the mandatory field.

Is there any guide to update the master data thru migration cokcpit?

SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit

entry.title: Details of Customers' Certificates is made mandatory in customer master template migration cockpit.
entry.content:
Dear All,

While uploading the customer master data in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud I saw the sheet with name "Certificate Details", and it's been marked as mandatory. 

The screenshot of the definition of certificate I have attached for your ref.

I have also gone through the SAP Help portal; there it mentioned that for India it's been marked as mandatory. The address linked I have added here for reference. - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d5699934e7004d048c4801b552f3b013/b251af240d9c41e9b9baf94603b9491a.html?locale=en-US&q=business%20partner%20certificate%20india

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/634261119fec4d58970471f2c4a9a740/38118c6119ec4bfcb43ff5bbec1fd818.html?locale=en-US&q=business%20partner%20ceryificate%20indis

So, how to upload of customer master data successfully using migration cockpit If I don't have any "Certificate Details" from the client end for customer master?

Any help is appreciated!  

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit SAP S/4HANA business partner

entry.title: Can we develop custom Adobe Forms from Scratch and Deploy the same to S4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently we are implementing S4HANA Public Cloud Version 2402 for a client and the requirement is to develop Custom Adobe Form from scratch for Service Entry Sheets. Could you please let me know if we can do this in Public Cloud and if yes how can we execute this? How to develop the user interface to trigger the developed form?

Note: This post is not about extending any existing Form Templates provide by SAP.

entry.title: Order-backlog Report for Customer Projects
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a very important requirement which is a main KPI in our business process. We need to create a report which gives us the details of the order backlog report i.e Order Backlog = Planned Costs - Actual Costs. We tried using some CDS view (I_ENGMNTPROJBILLGANDRBLSCUBE) to create a custom report but we failed in fetching the details. We have a work around solution by using the apps "Project Financial Controller Overview" and "Project Briefs" but this does give the orderbacklog information directly and cannot export to excel. Also, we are looking for the same requirement for our EPPM projects as well.         I would appreciate any expert opinions on this topic or if any members of the community is tracking Orderbacklogs from their business process.

Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Semifinish goods sales order
entry.content:
Hi all,

we have found that material type Semifinish good sales order is not displayed in Monitor Material Coverage or MD04.

Issue is that field VBAP-BEDAE is not automatically fulfilled(for RAW materials or Finish goods its automatically fulfilled).

Could you please advice how to setup these kind of materials to have it fulfilled without any manual input?

Thank you

#SAP HANA CLOUD

entry.title: Validation On PAN Card Number for Vendor Master in S4 Hana Public cloud
entry.content:
Requirement :  Need Validation On PAN Card for Vendor Master .
Validation :  
  • PAN Card Number Length 10 Character
  • First Five Character from A to Z
  • Four Numeric 0 to 9
  • Last One Character from A to Z
  • Like Valid PAN Card : "ABPQR7662A"

Please us know which badi needs to select and write the above validations for the PAN field.

entry.title: Custom Field connection through multiple Business Context
entry.content:
Hi, 

Is it possible to connect two different Custom Fields with different Business Contexts? 

We have created two custom fields containing a UN number, one for Master Data: Product General and one for Sales: Sales Document Item. They have the type of "Association to Business Object" and are connected to our Custom Business Object where we maintain UN number data. 

 


Now my question is:
Is it possible to connect these two custom fields so that if a product is given a UN number in the "Manage Product Master Data" app (first custom field) - that it will be automatically filled in the "Custom Fields" section of a sales order if the product entered has data in the custom field?  

Product Master Data custom field:

Sales Order custom field:



We are operating on a SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.

entry.title: SPED output message for automatic inbound delivery creation after GI in STO process
entry.content:
Hi expert

is it possible in SAP S4HANA Cloud Public to activate SPED message for automatic inbound delivery creation from outbound delivery after GI in STO process?

Thank you for Help!

Lisa

entry.title: Validation of Post and park option in App F0859
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2402, For application F0859(create supplier invoice) there is a request to cover the below scenarios :

Business Role 1 with F0859: In this role post button should not be available (only park) (this is achieved with note (2834732 - Restrict the authorization of users to post supplier invoices))

Business Role 2 with F0859 : In this role user is allowed to park and post but the condition is Document parked by user1 should not be allowed to post by user1.

To make possible scenario 2 : we have two options

1. To remove park option from the access - Is it technically possible ?

2. Can we have a validation in system (Document parked by user1 should not be allowed to post by user1) ?

Is there any other alternative option or can we achieve either of above option.

entry.title: Validation of standard data returns a validation error of 'non balancing amount'
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

In the Data Monitor application, validation of standard data (LC: INR) returns a validation error 'non balancing amount'(attached screenshot). Can someone please comment on why this validation error might occur and how can we fix this?

Thanks & Regards,

Rishav.

entry.title: Output Parameter Determination - Document in multiple languages
entry.content:
Hi,

My client has the requirement to have the invoice (and other documents) send to the recipient in multiple languages. So e.g. when the customer is based in Spain, the invoice has to be send in English and in Spanish.

I have tried to configure this in Output Parameter Determination, but no luck so far.

Is it possible to configure this in Output Parameter Determination? SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 

KR

entry.title: API for materialdocuments with movementtype 309 with warehouse management S4 Hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hi, we have to create mass material documents to book material to material (movement typ 309), in MM or directly in the warehouse. We are using public cloud with embedded warehouse management.

 

For MM there is the API material document create - but the delivery document is not created in the WHS.

If I try API warehouse task create direct in WHS - there is no API where I can create the corresponding delivery and the warehouse tasks.

Also I could not find an CDS view I can use to select the deliveries created from MM in WHS. Has somebody experience with this topic?

entry.title: how to activate SAML2 in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Dear all

our customer is in SAP PUBLIC CLOUD (not rise). can someone give some indication regarding how is it possible or the official guide to integrate in with SAML2?

Bruno

entry.title: Creating Base Planning Objects in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,
I would like to create Base Planning Objects or a cost estimate without quantity structure in the public cloud. Which apps can I use to do this?

 

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Scope ID: 1WO test - V1 215 "Requirements are not fulfilled for Condition PIC1"
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

In Credit memo for Intercompany (Billing type: CICM), we are unable to change the value for the condition type PIC1 - Intercompany Price which is copied from the reference Intercompany invoice.

Which is contradicting to the test script of the SCOPE ID 1WO. We are getting error: V1 215 "Requirements are not fulfilled for Condition PIC1"

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CDS View - Custom report
entry.content:
Dear Team, I am posting this on behalf of Partner that I am working with.

Customers do have a requirement to build a new report for the sales register. We require all the sales transactions, including Commercial Invoice (F2), credit notes, debit notes, and cancellations. We are currently facing issues identifying a document flow CDS for credit (CBAR) and CR documents. Can you suggest which CDS we can use for the document flow update of both credit and debit documents?

Regards

Pallavi Chand Shree

pallavi.chand.shree@sap.com

entry.title: Currently we are trying to migrate the data from other ERP to SAP S/4 Hana public cloud 2402
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Currently we are trying to migrate the data from Non SAP ERP to SAP S/4 Hana public cloud. We are facing the challenges regarding the G/l account migration. Our client opt for :-

1) Changing the account groups from the standard to user specific. For example changing the existing the balance sheet account group ABST(Standard) to CURA(Current assets),CURL(Current liabilities).

2)After that Mapping the existing standard G/L's with the client G/L's and adding the additional g/l's

3) Re - numbering of the G/L accounts and adding the additional g/l accounts

->The challenges we are facing is that, We need to create so many g/l accounts so is there any mass upload process available for the upload of g/l accounts in the public cloud 2402?

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP General Ledger Migration 

We have planned to follow below process please suggest the best process to meet the above requirements :- 

 

1copy the existing configuration of g/l's 
2Create New g/l account groups and transfer the existing data to that new account groups 
3Create additional vendor and customer account groups and recon accounts for that account groups as per the client requirement 
4Create additional bank incoming , outgoing , main bank account for house banks  as per the client requirement 
5do the renumbering 
6

create new g/l's that are not suitable with the pre delivered g/l's

entry.title: How to create Authorization Group ID to define allowlists for CDS View Extraction in S4HANA 2402?
entry.content:
We're trying to "Integrate CDS Views Using SAP Datasphere" to S4HANA2402. But we're stuck in one of the prerequisites - "You have created at least one authorization group ID with a CDS view allowlist. (To do so, proceed as follows: In your configuration environment, use the search function to open the following activity: Define Allowlists for CDS View Extraction.  When creating the communication arrangement, the communication user is assigned to an authorization group. CDS views that are not part of this authorization group will not be visible in in the CDS_EXTRACTION folder (the folder that is used to add source objects to a replication flow)".

the below link does not help "https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-to-create-an-authorization-group-for-quot-define-allowlists-for-cds/qaq-p/12664365ommunity".

Please help where and how to create Authorization Group ID to define allowlists for CDS View Extraction in S4HANA 2402?

Thanks

Salman
